## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `.\WinDiskCleanup.ps1 ...`
2. See error at step ...

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Paste any error messages or warnings from the terminal output.

## Environment
- Windows version: (e.g. Windows 11 23H2)
- PowerShell version: (run `$PSVersionTable.PSVersion`)
- Script version: (e.g. v1.4.0)
- Tools installed: (WSL / Docker Desktop / Docker in WSL / VS Code / Chrome / Edge)

## Report File
If a report was generated on your Desktop, paste the relevant section here.
